rules.name: Schema conformance
rules.requirement: Input conforms to Gate-12 Phase 1 Expansion Request Schema.

rules.name: Human sign-off binding
rules.requirement: Sign-off evidence binds requestId, requestHash, reviewer identity, timestamp and decision Approved.

rules.name: Frozen source resolution
rules.requirement: Existing Asset ID and every Gate Source Reference resolve to frozen manifests and commits.

rules.name: Version drift rejection
rules.requirement: Current source hashes equal the hashes bound by Human Sign-off.
